revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Pnt notice/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Pnt notice/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Pnt notice/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Pnt notice/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Pnt notice/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Pnt notice/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page. --> ==Usage== <nowiki>{{</nowiki>pnt notice|''language''|''cleanup''|Your comments here.}}
* '''''language''''': (Optional) The name of the language that requires translation (e.g. "French" or "Mexican Spanish"). If omitted, it is assumed that the language is unknown. * '''''cleanup''''': (Optional) If the literal text "cleanup" is specified, the message and links will point to [[WP:PNTCU]] instead of [[WP:PNTFC]]. * '''''comments''''': (Optional) If present, text will be passed through as the value of the 3rd (''Comments='') parameter in the invocation example
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Translation]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||<!-- Place CATEGORIES below --> [[Category:Wikipedia translation templates]]
[[sl:Predloga:Stp obvestilo]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page. --> ==Usage== <nowiki>{{</nowiki>pnt notice|''language''|''cleanup''|Your comments here.}}
* '''''language''''': (Optional) The name of the language that requires translation (e.g. "French" or "Mexican Spanish"). If omitted, it is assumed that the language is unknown. * '''''cleanup''''': (Optional) If the literal text "cleanup" is specified, the message and links will point to [[WP:PNTCU]] instead of [[WP:PNTFC]]. * '''''comments''''': (Optional) If present, text will be passed through as the value of the 3rd (''Comments='') parameter in the invocation example
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Translation]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||<!-- Place CATEGORIES below --> [[Category:Wikipedia translation templates]]
[[sl:Predloga:Stp obvestilo]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page. --> ==Usage== <nowiki>{{</nowiki>pnt notice|''language''|''cleanup''|Your comments here.}}
* '''''language''''': (Optional) The name of the language that requires translation (e.g. "French" or "Mexican Spanish"). If omitted, it is assumed that the language is unknown. * '''''cleanup''''': (Optional) If the literal text "cleanup" is specified, the message and links will point to [[WP:PNTCU]] instead of [[WP:PNTFC]]. * '''''comments''''': (Optional) If present, text will be passed through as the value of the 3rd (''Comments='') parameter in the invocation example
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Translation]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||<!-- Place CATEGORIES below --> [[Category:Wikipedia translation templates]]
[[sl:Predloga:Stp obvestilo]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page. --> ==Usage== <nowiki>{{</nowiki>pnt notice|''language''|''cleanup''|Your comments here.}}
* '''''language''''': (Optional) The name of the language that requires translation (e.g. "French" or "Mexican Spanish"). If omitted, it is assumed that the language is unknown. * '''''cleanup''''': (Optional) If the literal text "cleanup" is specified, the message and links will point to [[WP:PNTCU]] instead of [[WP:PNTFC]]. * '''''comments''''': (Optional) If present, text will be passed through as the value of the 3rd (''Comments='') parameter in the invocation example
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Translation]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||<!-- Place CATEGORIES below --> [[Category:Wikipedia translation templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page. --> ==Usage== <nowiki>{{</nowiki>pnt notice|''language''|''cleanup''|Your comments here.}}
* '''''language''''': (Optional) The name of the language that requires translation (e.g. "French" or "Mexican Spanish"). If omitted, it is assumed that the language is unknown. * '''''cleanup''''': (Optional) If the literal text "cleanup" is specified, the message and links will point to [[WP:PNTCU]] instead of [[WP:PNTFC]]. * '''''comments''''': (Optional) If present, text will be passed through as the value of the 3rd (''Comments='') parameter in the invocation example
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Translation]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||<!-- Place CATEGORIES below --> [[Category:Wikipedia translation templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page. --> ==Usage== <nowiki>{{</nowiki>pnt notice|''language''|''cleanup''|Your comments here.}}
* '''''language''''': (Optional) The name of the language that requires translation (e.g. "French" or "Mexican Spanish"). If omitted, it is assumed that the language is unknown. * '''''cleanup''''': (Optional) If the literal text "cleanup" is specified, the message and links will point to [[WP:PNTCU]] instead of [[WP:PNTFC]]. * '''''comments''''': (Optional) If present, text will be passed through as the value of the 3rd (''Comments='') parameter in the invocation example
==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Translation]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||<!-- Place CATEGORIES below -->
[[sl:Predloga:Stp obvestilo]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia translation templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
